name: Boise
tagline: Affordable Mountain Living in the Heart of Idaho
description: Boise offers an unbeatable combination of outdoor recreation, low crime, and a cost of living well below most Western US cities. The Boise Foothills are your backyard, the Boise River Greenbelt runs through town, and world-class skiing is just two hours away. Idaho's flat income tax and affordable housing make every FIRE dollar stretch further.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.safetyRating: High – consistently ranked among safest US cities
quickFacts.climate: Semi-arid with four distinct seasons; snowy winters and warm, dry summers

housing.description: 1BR apartment in the Bench or Garden City area

dining.description: Casual dining 2x/week; local brewpubs and taco spots

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan through Your Health Idaho exchange

transportation.description: Paid-off car with basic insurance; Boise is very car-dependent

entertainment.description: Hiking the Foothills, Greenbelt biking, library; occasional movie night

1M.lifestyle: A one-bedroom apartment in the Bench or Garden City, a paid-off car, and cooking at home most nights. Healthcare on an ACA Silver plan takes a meaningful share of the budget. Entertainment leans heavily on free public lands -- the Boise Foothills, the Greenbelt, and nearby BLM land are all accessible without spending much. This is a simple, outdoors-focused life with real budget constraints, but manageable if you do not need urban amenities.

housing.description: 2BR apartment in the North End or a small house in West Boise

dining.description: Dining out 3-4x/week; enjoying Boise's growing restaurant scene on 8th Street

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental; manageable deductibles

transportation.description: Reliable AWD vehicle for winter driving, full insurance coverage

entertainment.description: Bogus Basin ski pass, mountain biking gear, Treefort Music Fest, gym membership

2M.lifestyle: A place in the tree-lined North End or a small house in West Boise, dining out several times a week on 8th Street, and a reliable AWD vehicle for winter driving. A Bogus Basin ski pass fits comfortably in the budget, and weekend road trips to Sun Valley or McCall are within reach. Good health insurance and a gym membership round things out. This is a comfortable, active life with room for hobbies and a few trips each year.

housing.description: 3BR home in the North End, Harris Ranch, or a Foothills property with views

dining.description: Regular fine dining at Chandlers, Richard's, and Boise's best; wine tasting events

healthcare.description: Premium private health insurance with low deductibles and full dental/vision

transportation.description: Late-model SUV ideal for mountain roads, premium insurance, seasonal tires

entertainment.description: Multiple ski passes, fly fishing trips, BSU season tickets, golf membership

3M.lifestyle: A three-bedroom home in Harris Ranch or the North End with Foothills views, regular dinners at Chandlers and Richard's, and a late-model SUV for mountain roads. You can afford premium health insurance, a golf membership, BSU season tickets, and multiple ski passes. Weekend fly-fishing trips and regular travel are within budget. This is a genuinely affluent life by Boise standards, with plenty of flexibility for outdoor pursuits and entertainment.

housing.description: Custom home in the Boise Foothills or a large estate in Eagle or Meridian

dining.description: Fine dining several times per week, wine club memberships, catered gatherings

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine practice, executive wellness, comprehensive private insurance

transportation.description: Luxury SUV (Land Rover, Lexus), second vehicle, premium everything

entertainment.description: Private ski lessons, heli-skiing trips, club memberships, BSU booster level

domesticHelp.description: Weekly house cleaning, landscaping, snow removal service

luxuryExtras.description: Sun Valley cabin weekends, quarterly travel, outdoor gear upgrades, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A custom home in the Boise Foothills or a large property in Eagle, a housekeeper who comes weekly, and a nice SUV. You dine at the city's best restaurants regularly, hold concierge medical coverage, and fly business class for longer trips. Guided fly-fishing trips, private ski lessons, and a cabin rental in Sun Valley on weekends are all within budget. Idaho's flat income tax rate keeps more of each withdrawal in your pocket.

housing.description: Trophy property in the Boise Foothills or a compound in Eagle with acreage

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive wine dinners, catered events and parties

healthcare.description: Top-tier concierge practice, medical travel for specialists, full wellness team

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private car service, occasional chartered flights

entertainment.description: International ski trips, private river access, art collecting, major philanthropy

domesticHelp.description: Full-time property manager, housekeeper, personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Second home in Sun Valley, first-class international travel, ranch land, angel investing

10M.lifestyle: A large property in the Foothills or Eagle with mountain views, a cook who comes in several times a week, full-time domestic help, and top-tier concierge healthcare. You travel first class, keep multiple vehicles, and dine out without thinking about the cost. A second home in Sun Valley is feasible at this budget. Boise is a small enough city that this level of spending puts you among the most comfortable residents in the metro, with significant margin for charitable giving and travel.
